headlines.description: Bundesliga top scorer Harry Kane netted a 68th-minute penalty to give Bayern Munich a 1-0 victory at Borussia Moenchengladbach on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane penalty earns Bayern vital win over Gladbach

video.headline: Harry Kane penalty makes it 1-0 Bayern vs. Gladbach
